meta.title: LONA — Art that makes brands
meta.description: We connect brands and artists to create permanent works. LONA Street and LONA Install — two ways to leave a legacy.

hero.sub: We connect brands and artists to create permanent works.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
excerpt: We don't make campaigns. We make works.
We don't sell impressions. We create moments.
We don't leave damaged walls. We leave legacies.

street.label: LONA Street
street.title: The city as canvas
street.description: A large-format work, created live over days. The process is public. People stop, film, share. In the end, the brand has a campaign no billboard can replicate — and a signed work with market value.

install.label: LONA Install
install.title: The space as identity
install.description: A work created specifically for a space — a headquarters, a hotel, a restaurant. The artist absorbs what the brand is and creates something that could only exist there. The making-of is documented. The work stays forever.

artists.label: Roster
artists.heading:
Not a catalogue.
A relationship.
artists.sub: A small, intentional group of artists whose work we stand behind.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Want a work?
contact.sub: Talk to us. No pressure — just a conversation.

workPage.label: Work
workPage.heading: Works that last
workPage.noProjects: Coming soon — projects on the way.

contactPage.label: Contact
contactPage.heading: Let's create something
contactPage.sub: Tell us about your project. Or just your space and what you want it to say.
